conjecture: The Eisenstein integer norm N(a plus b omega) equals a squared minus ab plus b squared and is multiplicative for all products
decomposition_raw:
[{"id": "S1", "statement": "For all Eisenstein integers $x$ and $y$, $N(xy) = N(x)N(y)$", "verifier": "norm_multiplicative", "args": {"N": "positive integer number of random test pairs"}, "reason": "Verifies the multiplicative property of the Eisenstein integer norm stated in the original conjecture"}]
